name: iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF
business: iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT) is a Delaware statutory trust that issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets, which consist primarily of bitcoin. The Trust seeks to reflect generally the performance of the price of bitcoin before payment of expenses and liabilities. Shares are listed on NASDAQ under ticker IBIT.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The Trust seeks to reflect generally the performance of the price of bitcoin.
